title: beskid pckg pack --package-kind tool

source.subject: feat(pckg): `beskid pckg pack --package-kind tool` and override-aware profile detection

body:
## What shipped

CLI supports `beskid pckg pack --package-kind tool` with override-aware profile detection for tool packages.

## Source commit
